title.en: China-to-South Sudan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入南苏丹：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入南蘇丹：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against South Sudan SSNBS and SSEC market expectations, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and the newest country's nascent, low-electrification, donor- and China-engaged off-grid / diesel-replacement project conditions — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与南苏丹SSNBS和SSEC市场预期、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727并网接口证据、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数，以及这个最新独立国家低电气化、捐助方和中国均参与的新兴离网/柴油替代项目条件——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與南蘇丹SSNBS和SSEC市場預期、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727併網介面證據、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數，以及這個最新獨立國家低電氣化、捐助方和中國均參與的新興離網/柴油替代項目條件——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SSNBS standards-adoption determination, SSEC grid-connection approval, donor-procurement eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. South Sudan's standards and electricity-sector capacity remains nascent; exporters, importers, EPCs, and project owners should verify current SSNBS requirements, SSEC connection conditions, donor specifications, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SSNBS标准采纳裁定、SSEC并网批准、捐助方采购资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。南苏丹标准和电力部门能力仍处于起步阶段；出口商、进口商、EPC和项目业主在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行SSNBS要求、SSEC接入条件、捐助方规格和项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SSNBS標準採納裁定、SSEC併網批准、捐助方採購資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。南蘇丹標準和電力部門能力仍處於起步階段；出口商、進口商、EPC和項目業主在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SSNBS要求、SSEC接入條件、捐助方規格和項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to South Sudan, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming whether SSNBS or the project owner requires IEC-based evidence because local product-specific rules are still developing; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (3) IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence where a system connects to SSEC or a mini-grid; (4) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) validation for South Sudan's 50 Hz / 230/400 V nominal supply and severe heat conditions. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 evidence should not be treated as automatically accepted in South Sudan.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口南苏丹时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认SSNBS或项目业主是否要求IEC证据，因为当地产品专项规则仍在发展中；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）接入SSEC或微电网时的IEC 62116和IEC 61727并网接口证据；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）针对南苏丹50 Hz / 230/400 V标称供电及极端高温条件的验证。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024证据不应被视为在南苏丹自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口南蘇丹時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認SSNBS或項目業主是否要求IEC證據，因為當地產品專項規則仍在發展中；（2）IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）接入SSEC或微電網時的IEC 62116和IEC 61727併網介面證據；（4）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）針對南蘇丹50 Hz / 230/400 V標稱供電及極端高溫條件的驗證。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024證據不應被視為在南蘇丹自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
